evidence.snippet:
Stay Charged
------------
BETA Charge Cubes, Mini Cubes and Thermal Management System  (TMS) Cubes are multimodal to meet the charge needs of electric aircraft and electric vehicles ensuring the safest, fastest and most reliable charge.[JOIN THE CHARGE NETWORK](https://cta-service-cms2.hubspot.com/web-interactives/public/v1/track/click?encryptedPayload=AVxigLKuXatqWnPkZ6pAbHD9Uru3EUyjj5xxjlxFDd%2FuxFHJbla8rOQIauz5wbQndapJOH1umsFoDxeEaMQy%2F3xO8cHSFQd7XfubwcNBbU6Fj82znfyxtRMWSKaOpIgB7eh7hB5UnbFn9L8LaKrpefyEsyrEPd7hBddqCD%2BSp6OIU3OMIS1e%2F8zwoDMaGqsLmcji1edw&portalId=47449398)

items.notes: BETA produces aircraft batteries and Charge Cubes / Mini Cubes / TMS Cubes for electric aircraft charging.
BETA offers Flight Controls (flight control computers) as a named product line; aircraft uses fly-by-wire technology developed in-house.

products_categories.notes: Product pages (aircraft, motor, battery, charge, defense, flight-controls) were skipped; categories inferred from homepage nav and press releases. Charge Cubes classified as power_systems (aircraft charging infrastructure).

evidence.snippet: BETA Technologies. [1150 Airport Drive South Burlington Vermont 05403](https://www.google.com/maps/place/1150+Airport+Dr,+South+Burlington,+VT+05403/@44.4664016,-73.1568485,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m5!3m4!1s0x4cca7985970e4387:0x80739e04233d6a93!8m2!3d44.4664016!4d-73.1546598)
An aerospace company manufacturing electric flight.

BETA's advanced technologies are built in a 188,000-square-foot,
net-zero manufacturing and production space. From certified motors
to UL-listed Charge Cubes, our facility uniquely positions BETA as an industry leader.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: BETA designs and manufactures complete electric VTOL and CTOL aircraft (ALIA family). Also sells subsystems (motors, batteries, flight controls) to other OEMs.

products.notes: Named product families confirmed from homepage nav and news. Individual product detail pages were skipped; further specifics on SKUs would require fetching those pages.

evidence.snippet:
BETA's advanced technologies are built in a 188,000-square-foot,
net-zero manufacturing and production space. From certified motors
to UL-listed Charge Cubes, our facility uniquely positions BETA as an industry leader.

With an established customer base for both CTOL and VTOL aircraft, and more than 800 aircraft in the backlog, BETA is funded by military contracts, firm deposits, charging sales, federal financing from the Export-Import Bank of the United States (EXIM) and equity investment.
Inside BETA's first flight of its production model

readiness.notes: 188,000 sq ft manufacturing and production facility; 800+ aircraft in backlog; first flight of production model documented.

unresolved_questions: Exact product specs and SKU details for Motor, Battery, and Flight Controls product lines (pages skipped)

tagline: All-electric VTOL and fixed-wing airframes in production (ALIA series), plus certified electric motors, fly-by-wire flight controls, batteries, and multimodal charging infrastructure. Four reported DoD engagements; 800+ aircraft backlog. NDAA compliance and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence on military integration is thin beyond logistics claims.
